name: Console Print
description: Prints the input data to the console. Triggered by execution pin or reactive data changes.
python_code:
async def execute(self, inputs):
    data_val = inputs.get('data')
    data = str(data_val) if data_val is not None else ''
    self.log_success(f'[FINAL PRINT]: {data}')
    print(f'PRINT NODE: {data}')
    await self.set_output('out', data)
    await self.set_output('exec_out', True)
    return {'out': data}

async def on_parameter_changed(self, name, value):
    if name == 'data':
        self.parameters['out'] = value
        # REACTIVE: Always log data changes to the console/log panel
        # This ensures that streaming nodes like 'Sequence' show every step
        self.log_info(f'[STREAM]: {value}')
        print(f'STREAM PRINT: {value}')
